mapper.select:
select x.fac_chk_hstry_no , x.facility_no , x.facility_nm , x.facility_ty_cd , x.facility_ty_nm , x.partner_no , x.chk_flow_no , x.partner_nm , x.biz_ty_nm , x.chk_ctgry_cd , x.chk_ctgry_nm , x.chk_ty_cd , x.chk_ty_nm , x.chk_stts_cd , x.chk_stts_nm , x.chk_dt , x.chk_cn , x.use_restrict_yn , x.use_restrict_bgng_dt , x.use_restrict_end_dt , x.use_restrict_status_cd , x.use_restrict_status_nm from ( select row_number() over(order by fch.chk_dt desc, fch.fac_chk_hstry_no desc) as rn , fch.fac_chk_hstry_no , fch.facility_no , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , fac_ty.code_name as facility_ty_nm , fch.partner_no , fch.chk_flow_no , p.partner_nm , p.biz_ty_nm , fch.chk_ctgry_cd , chk_ctgry.code_name as chk_ctgry_nm , fch.chk_ty_cd , chk_ty.code_name as chk_ty_nm , fch.chk_stts_cd , chk_stts.code_name as chk_stts_nm , to_char(fch.chk_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as chk_dt , fch.chk_cn , nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') as use_restrict_yn , to_char(fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_bgng_dt , to_char(fch.use_restrict_end_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_end_dt , case when nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') = 'N' then 'NONE' when sysdate >= fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt and sysdate < fch.use_restrict_end_dt then 'ONGOING' when fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt > sysdate then 'UPCOMING' else 'ENDED' end as use_restrict_status_cd , case when nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') = 'N' then '제한없음' when sysdate >= fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt and sysdate < fch.use_restrict_end_dt then '제한중' when fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt > sysdate then '제한예정' else '제한종료' end as use_restrict_status_nm
) x where x.rn between #{startRow} and #{endRow} order by x.rn

select nvl(count(*), 0) as total_cnt , nvl(sum(case when fch.chk_stts_cd = 'WAIT' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as wait_cnt , nvl(sum(case when fch.chk_stts_cd = 'ING' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as ing_cnt , nvl(sum(case when fch.chk_stts_cd = 'FAULT' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as fault_cnt from facility_check_hstry fch inner join facility f on fch.facility_no = f.facility_no left outer join partner p on fch.partner_no = p.partner_no and p.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo}

select fch.fac_chk_hstry_no , fch.facility_no , f.facility_nm , fch.chk_ctgry_cd , chk_ctgry.code_name as chk_ctgry_nm , fch.chk_ty_cd , chk_ty.code_name as chk_ty_nm , fch.chk_stts_cd , chk_stts.code_name as chk_stts_nm , fch.chk_cn , nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') as use_restrict_yn , to_char(fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_bgng_dt , to_char(fch.use_restrict_end_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_end_dt , case when sysdate >= fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt and sysdate < fch.use_restrict_end_dt then 'ONGOING' when fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt > sysdate then 'UPCOMING' else 'ENDED' end as use_restrict_status_cd , case when sysdate >= fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt and sysdate < fch.use_restrict_end_dt then '제한중' when fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt > sysdate then '예정' else '종료' end as use_restrict_status_nm from facility_check_hstry fch inner join facility f on fch.facility_no = f.facility_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no left join common_code chk_ty on chk_ty.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' and chk_ty.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd and chk_ty.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_ctgry on chk_ctgry.group_code_no = 'CHECK_CTGRY' and chk_ctgry.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ctgry_cd and chk_ctgry.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_stts on chk_stts.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' and chk_stts.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd and chk_stts.use_yn = 'Y' where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') = 'Y' and fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt < trunc(sysdate) + 1
and fch.use_restrict_end_dt > sysdate order by fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, fch.fac_chk_hstry_no

select fch.fac_chk_hstry_no , fch.facility_no , f.facility_nm , fch.chk_ctgry_cd , chk_ctgry.code_name as chk_ctgry_nm , fch.chk_ty_cd , chk_ty.code_name as chk_ty_nm , fch.chk_stts_cd , chk_stts.code_name as chk_stts_nm , fch.chk_cn , nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') as use_restrict_yn , to_char(fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_bgng_dt , to_char(fch.use_restrict_end_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_end_dt , 'UPCOMING' as use_restrict_status_cd , '예정' as use_restrict_status_nm from facility_check_hstry fch inner join facility f on fch.facility_no = f.facility_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no left join common_code chk_ty on chk_ty.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' and chk_ty.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd and chk_ty.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_ctgry on chk_ctgry.group_code_no = 'CHECK_CTGRY' and chk_ctgry.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ctgry_cd and chk_ctgry.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_stts on chk_stts.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' and chk_stts.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd and chk_stts.use_yn = 'Y' where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') = 'Y' and fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt >= trunc(sysdate) + 1 order by fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, fch.fac_chk_hstry_no

select fch.fac_chk_hstry_no , fch.facility_no , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , fac_ty.code_name as facility_ty_nm , f.loc_cn , to_char(f.instl_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as instl_dt , f.use_yn , fch.partner_no , fch.chk_flow_no , p.partner_nm , p.biz_ty_nm , p.bizrno , p.pic_nm , p.pic_telno , p.pic_email , fch.chk_ctgry_cd , chk_ctgry.code_name as chk_ctgry_nm , fch.chk_ty_cd , chk_ty.code_name as chk_ty_nm , fch.chk_stts_cd , chk_stts.code_name as chk_stts_nm , to_char(fch.chk_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as chk_dt , fch.chk_cn , nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') as use_restrict_yn , to_char(fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_bgng_dt , to_char(fch.use_restrict_end_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_end_dt , fch.rmk , to_char(fch.reg_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as reg_dt , to_char(fch.mdf_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as mdf_dt , fch.cont_no , fc.cont_nm , to_char(fc.cont_bgng_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_bgng_dt , to_char(fc.cont_end_dt, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as cont_end_dt from facility_check_hstry fch inner join facility f on fch.facility_no = f.facility_no left outer join partner p on fch.partner_no = p.partner_no and p.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no left join common_code fac_ty on fac_ty.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and fac_ty.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd and fac_ty.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_ty on chk_ty.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' and chk_ty.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd and chk_ty.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_ctgry on chk_ctgry.group_code_no = 'CHECK_CTGRY' and chk_ctgry.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ctgry_cd and chk_ctgry.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_stts on chk_stts.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' and chk_stts.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd and chk_stts.use_yn = 'Y' left join facility_contract fc on fc.partner_no = fch.partner_no and fc.cont_no = fch.cont_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and fch.fac_chk_hstry_no = #{facChkHstryNo}

select f.facility_no , f.facility_nm , f.facility_ty_cd , fac_ty.code_name as facility_ty_nm , f.dong_no , au.dong_nm , f.loc_cn , f.use_yn , to_char(f.instl_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as instl_dt from facility f inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no left join ( select apt_cmplex_no , dong_no , max(dong_nm) as dong_nm from apt_unit group by apt_cmplex_no, dong_no ) au on au.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no and au.dong_no = f.dong_no left join common_code fac_ty on fac_ty.group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and fac_ty.code_no_cd = f.facility_ty_cd and fac_ty.use_yn = 'Y' where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} order by f.facility_nm, f.facility_no

select p.partner_no , p.partner_nm , p.biz_ty_nm , p.bizrno , p.use_yn , p.pic_nm , p.pic_telno , p.pic_email from partner p inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = p.apt_cmplex_no where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and p.use_yn = 'Y' order by p.partner_nm, p.partner_no
select group_code_no , code_no_cd , code_name , code_content , sort_order , use_yn from common_code where group_code_no = #{groupCodeNo} and use_yn = 'Y' order by sort_order, code_no_cd
select group_code_no , code_no_cd , code_name , sort_order from common_code where group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and use_yn = 'Y' and code_no_cd in () order by sort_order, code_no_cd
select group_code_no , code_no_cd , code_name , sort_order from common_code where group_code_no = 'FACILITY_TY' and use_yn = 'Y' and code_no_cd not in () order by sort_order, code_no_cd

select fch.fac_chk_hstry_no , fch.facility_no , f.facility_nm , fch.partner_no , fch.chk_flow_no , p.pic_nm , p.pic_telno , p.pic_email , p.partner_nm , p.biz_ty_nm , fch.chk_ctgry_cd , chk_ctgry.code_name as chk_ctgry_nm , fch.chk_ty_cd , chk_ty.code_name as chk_ty_nm , fch.chk_stts_cd , chk_stts.code_name as chk_stts_nm , to_char(fch.chk_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as chk_dt , fch.chk_cn , nvl(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') as use_restrict_yn , to_char(fch.use_restrict_bgng_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_bgng_dt , to_char(fch.use_restrict_end_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd"T"hh24:mi') as use_restrict_end_dt , fch.rmk , to_char(fch.reg_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as reg_dt , to_char(fch.mdf_dt, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as mdf_dt from facility_check_hstry fch inner join facility f on fch.facility_no = f.facility_no left outer join partner p on fch.partner_no = p.partner_no and p.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no inner join mgmt_office mo on mo.apt_cmplex_no = f.apt_cmplex_no left join common_code chk_ty on chk_ty.group_code_no = 'CHECK_TY' and chk_ty.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ty_cd and chk_ty.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_ctgry on chk_ctgry.group_code_no = 'CHECK_CTGRY' and chk_ctgry.code_no_cd = fch.chk_ctgry_cd and chk_ctgry.use_yn = 'Y' left join common_code chk_stts on chk_stts.group_code_no = 'CHECK_STTS' and chk_stts.code_no_cd = fch.chk_stts_cd and chk_stts.use_yn = 'Y' where mo.mgmt_ofc_no = #{mgmtOfcNo} and fch.facility_no = #{facilityNo} order by fch.chk_dt desc, fch.fac_chk_hstry_no desc
